title: How to center a div in CSS
content: Use flexbox on the parent: display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;

title: How to get the last element of an array in JavaScript
content: Use array[array.length - 1] or array.at(-1) in modern JavaScript.

How to disable a submit button in a form
content: Add the disabled attribute to the button or set button.disabled = true in JavaScript.

How to debounce a function in JavaScript
content: Use setTimeout and clearTimeout to delay execution until input stops.

title: How to prevent a form from submitting
content: Call event.preventDefault() inside the submit event handler.
